name: ISV Telemetry Sample
brief: Demonstrates all extension telemetry signals that can be emitted to Application Insights
description: This app demonstrates each telemetry signal emitted in extension telemetry (RT0030, RT0010, AL0000EJ9, AL0000EJA, RT0018, RT0005, CL0001, RT0006, RT0007, RT0011, AL0000N0E, AL0000N0H, AL0000N0I, AL0000N0F, AL0000N0G, LC0025, RT0008, RT0053, RT0019, and more)
